notes.hr: Referentna točka Barbadosa — destilerija deklarira bez aditiva. Suho voće i hrast; odličan i uz cigaru.
notes.en: A Barbados benchmark — the distillery declares no additives. Dried fruit and oak; excellent with a cigar too.

notes.hr: Vrh ECS serije, cask strength, bez aditiva (deklaracija destilerije).
notes.en: Top of the ECS series, cask strength, no additives (distillery declaration).

notes.hr: Visoki esteri, funk, nosi najjacu cigaru
Suh, začinski; izvrstan omjer cijene i kvalitete, bez dodanog šećera (deklaracija).
notes.en: Dry, spicy; excellent value, no added sugar (declared).

name: Flor de Cana 12/18
cigarHint: Srednja suha; Connecticut ili sredni maduro

notes.hr: Suh za DR, double-aged sherry, ZA cigare
Namjenski za cigare, Global Spirits Masters gold
Bogat, melasa, tamno voće, sjajan uz cigaru
Slazen ali ozbiljna baza, dobar uz cigaru

notes.hr: Doslazen ali ugodan uz jaču/maduro cigaru
Blend Barbadosa i Jamajke; mlad, bez dodanog šećera (procjena, nije mjereno).
notes.en: Barbados & Jamaica blend; young, no added sugar (estimate, not measured).

name: Diplomatico Reserva Exclusiva
additiveSource: Alko/Systembolaget lab (novije boce ispod 20 g/L radi EU pravila)

serving.best: Velika kocka leda ili kap vode

notes.hr: Doslađen (~15–20 g/L, lab mjerenja); bogat i mekan profil karamele. Jedan od najpopularnijih rumova uz maduro cigare.
notes.en: Sweetened (~15–20 g/L, lab measured); rich, soft caramel profile. One of the most popular rums with maduro cigars.

serving.best: Velika kocka leda ili kap vode

notes.hr: Peruanska solera; doslađen, baršunast profil vanilije i karamele — desertni stil koji uz punu cigaru radi kontrast.
notes.en: Peruvian solera; sweetened, velvety vanilla-caramel profile — a dessert style that contrasts nicely with a full cigar.

notes.hr: Mlad kubanski rum; najčešće u koktelima i highballu.
notes.en: Young Cuban rum; most at home in cocktails and highballs.

serving.best: Velika kocka leda ili kap vode
Velika kocka leda ili kap vode

notes.hr: Izražena naranča i slatkoća — desertni/liker profil; podijeljene ocjene zajednice.
notes.en: Pronounced orange and sweetness — dessert/liqueur profile; divisive among reviewers.

serving.best: Velika kocka leda ili kap vode

notes.hr: Standard za daiquiri — mlad, svjež, suh.
notes.en: The daiquiri standard — young, fresh, dry.

serving.best: Velika kocka leda ili kap vode
Velika kocka leda ili kap vode

notes.hr: Slađen spirit drink (EU oznaka zbog šećera); mekan desertni profil karamele — publika ga voli, kritika manje.
notes.en: Sweetened spirit drink (EU label due to sugar); soft caramel dessert profile — loved by the public, less by critics.

notes.hr: Slatki, pristupačni profil vanilije i karamele u nižem cjenovnom razredu.
notes.en: Sweet, approachable vanilla-caramel profile in the budget range.

name: Zacapa XO 25 / Royal
additiveDetail: Dodani secer (Alko lab; novije boce ispod 20 g/L)

serving.best: Velika kocka leda ili kap vode

notes.hr: Solera sistem, doslađen (lab mjerenja); bogat, mekan, s notama suhog voća i hrasta. Visoka cijena za kategoriju — navedeno radi informacije.
notes.en: Solera system, sweetened (lab measured); rich and soft with dried fruit and oak. Priced at the top of its category — noted for information.

name: Ableforth's Rumbullion!
additiveDetail: Dodani: vanilija, cimet, naranca, klincic, kardamom

notes.hr: Craft spiced na bazi karipskog ruma; dodani madagaskarska vanilija, naranča i začini (deklarirano). Među najbolje ocijenjenim spiced rumovima.
notes.en: Craft spiced rum on a Caribbean base; Madagascan vanilla, orange and spices added (declared). Among the best-rated spiced rums.

name: Legendario Elixir / Anejo 9 (Kuba)
additiveDetail: Dodani secer i suho grozdje (elixir kategorija)

notes.hr: Kubanski 'elixir' — kategorija s dodanim šećerom i suhim grožđem (deklarirano). Vrlo sladak, popularan desertni stil.
notes.en: Cuban 'elixir' — a category with added sugar and raisins (declared). Very sweet, popular dessert style.

notes.hr: Jamajčanska baza s dodanom vanilijom, kokosom i začinima (deklarirano). Uredno napravljen spiced iz Ferrand grupe.
notes.en: Jamaican base with added vanilla, coconut and spices (declared). A well-made spiced rum from the Ferrand group.

notes.hr: Jamajčanska baza s dodanom narančom i šećerom — liker-profil (deklarirano na kategoriji).
notes.en: Jamaican base with added orange and sugar — liqueur profile (category-declared).

name: Don Papa 7
additiveDetail: Lab: ~29 g/L secera + 2,4 g/L glicerola + vanilin ~360 mg/L
cigarHint: Puna maduro cigara za kontrast slatkoci

notes.hr: Filipinski rum s otoka Negros. Neovisna mjerenja: ~29 g/L dodanog šećera, glicerol i vanilin — izražena vanilija i suho voće, desertni profil. U EU iznad 20 g/L nosi oznaku 'spirit drink'. Popularan kod publike; kritika ga smatra slatkim — ovdje samo deklariramo činjenice.
notes.en: Filipino rum from Negros island. Independent measurements: ~29 g/L added sugar plus glycerol and vanillin — pronounced vanilla and dried fruit, dessert profile. Above 20 g/L it is labelled 'spirit drink' in the EU. Popular with the public; critics find it sweet — we simply declare the facts.

name: Don Papa Baroko
additiveSource: Systembolaget: visok secer; EU etiketa 'spirit drink'
cigarHint: Puna maduro cigara za kontrast slatkoci

notes.hr: Intenzivnija, tamnija verzija Don Pape — kakao, vanilija, suho voće; izrazito sladak desertni stil. U EU deklariran kao 'spirit drink' zbog razine dodanog šećera.
notes.en: A more intense, darker Don Papa — cocoa, vanilla, dried fruit; distinctly sweet dessert style. Declared 'spirit drink' in the EU due to added-sugar level.

notes.hr: Jednostavan smeđi rum nižeg cjenovnog razreda; najčešće za miješanje.
notes.en: Simple budget brown rum; mostly for mixing.

notes.hr: Slađeni 'elixir' iz diskonta; jednostavan profil za miješanje.
notes.en: Discount 'elixir' with added sugar; simple mixing profile.

name: Takamaka Dark Spiced
additiveDetail: Dodane arome i secer (38%, spirit drink)

notes.hr: Sejšelski spiced (38%); dodane arome i šećer — na EU etiketi 'spirit drink'.
notes.en: Seychelles spiced (38%); added flavours and sugar — labelled 'spirit drink' in the EU.

name: The Kraken Black Spiced
additiveDetail: Dodane arome (klincic, cimet, vanilija) i karamel boja; secer ~26 g/L

notes.hr: Tamni spiced s dodanim začinima i karamel bojom; mjerenja pokazuju ~26 g/L šećera. Vrlo popularan u svojoj kategoriji.
notes.en: Dark spiced with added spices and caramel colour; measurements show ~26 g/L sugar. Very popular in its category.

notes.hr: Globalni standard za koktele (mojito, daiquiri, cuba libre).
notes.en: The global cocktail standard (mojito, daiquiri, cuba libre).
Dominican white rum for cocktails.

notes.hr: Pristupačni dominikanski rum; zlatna varijanta ima blagu karamelu.
notes.en: Approachable Dominican rum; the gold variant shows light caramel.

name: Bumbu Original
additiveDetail: Systembolaget: ~51 g/L secera; hidrometrija ~40 g/L; arome vanilije/banane
additiveSource: Systembolaget lab lista; javni hidrometrijski testovi
cigarHint: Puna maduro cigara za kontrast slatkoci

notes.hr: Barbadoška baza s dodanim šećerom (~40–51 g/L po neovisnim mjerenjima) i aromama — vanilija, karamela, banana. U SAD-u se puni na 35% (kategorija 'rum specialty'), u EU na 40% uz oznaku 'spirit drink'. Vrlo popularan desertni profil.
notes.en: Barbados base with added sugar (~40–51 g/L per independent measurements) and flavourings — vanilla, caramel, banana. Bottled at 35% in the US ('rum specialty' category) and 40% in the EU as a 'spirit drink'. A very popular dessert profile.

name: Bumbu XO
additiveDetail: Hidrometrija: ~19 g/L dodataka (znatno manje od Originala)

notes.hr: Panamski rum dozrijevan u ex-bourbon i sherry bačvama, dovršen u andaluzijskim sherry bačvama. Mjerenja pokazuju ~19 g/L dodataka — unutar EU granice za rum. Mekan profil vanilije, karamele i hrasta.
notes.en: Panamanian rum aged in ex-bourbon and sherry casks, finished in Andalusian sherry casks. Measurements show ~19 g/L additives — within the EU limit for rum. Soft vanilla, caramel and oak profile.

notes.hr: Indonezijska baza (šećerna trska s Jave) s dodanim aromama; slatki spiced profil.
notes.en: Indonesian base (Java cane) with added flavours; sweet spiced profile.
Venezuelan white rum for cocktails.

notes.hr: Njemački brend spiced ruma; slatki profil vanilije i začina.
notes.en: German spiced rum brand; sweet vanilla-spice profile.

notes.hr: Pristupačne spiced varijante; sherry verzija ima note suhog voća.
notes.en: Approachable spiced variants; the sherry version shows dried-fruit notes.

name: A.H. Riise XO Thin Blue Line

notes.hr: Slađeni spirit drink iz A.H. Riise linije; mekan, desertni profil.
notes.en: Sweetened spirit drink from the A.H. Riise range; soft dessert profile.

notes.hr: Pristupačni spiced za koktele s colom.
notes.en: Approachable spiced for rum-and-cola serves.

notes.hr: Najprodavaniji spiced brend na svijetu; vanilija i začini, najčešće s colom.
notes.en: The world's best-selling spiced brand; vanilla and spice, usually with cola.
Basic white rum for cocktails.

notes.hr: Karipska baza na 46% s dodanom vanilijom i cimetom; jači spiced standard.
notes.en: Caribbean base at 46% with added vanilla and cinnamon; a stronger spiced standard.

notes.hr: Austrijski Inländer rum, 80% — tradicionalno za kuhanje, punč i kolače; kao piće se jako razrjeđuje.
notes.en: Austrian Inländer rum, 80% — traditionally for baking, punch and cakes; heavily diluted as a drink.

notes.hr: Voćno aromatizirane varijante (marakuja, spiced); slatki liker-profil.
notes.en: Fruit-flavoured variants (passionfruit, spiced); sweet liqueur profile.

notes.hr: Krem liker na rum bazi (15%); desertni stil poput irish creama — uz kavu ili desert.
notes.en: Rum-based cream liqueur (15%); dessert style akin to Irish cream — with coffee or dessert.

notes.hr: Referentni kokosov liker na rum bazi (21%); pina colada standard.
notes.en: The reference coconut rum liqueur (21%); the piña colada standard.
